Origin of Time is an item we only receive when devs buff characters in a significant way, or in particular events, it allows you to reset a character. 
This can either mean that he get reseted back to level 1 and you receive the materials used on them or it allows you to send them back to the Black Pool, this is only for Standard Characters, which means you remove them and receive any materials used plus Standard Selectors for every copy of them you had (i.e. an E2 Standard unit would give 3 selectors, so is better to pull a lot in one realm before using it and then remove a bad unit with the most dupes).
Same thing can be done with Standard Wheels for Standard Wheels Selectors.
